sourcesContent:
// src/data/tickets.js

const tickets = [
  {
    id: 1,
    trainNumber: '12345',
    trainName: 'Rajdhani Express',
    from: 'Delhi',
    to: 'Mumbai',
    date: '2025-08-10',
    numberOfTickets: 2,
    name: 'Ravi Sharma',
    contact: '9876543210',
    age: 30,
    gender: 'Male',
    travelClass: 'AC 3-Tier',
    contactVisible: false
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    trainNumber: '22222',
    trainName: 'Shatabdi Express',
    from: 'Kolkata',
    to: 'Delhi',
    date: '2025-08-11',
    numberOfTickets: 1,
    name: 'Priya Sen',
    contact: '9999988888',
    age: 28,
    gender: 'Female',
    travelClass: 'Sleeper',
    contactVisible: false
  }
];

export default tickets;
